runTitle: Playwright MCP Production QA - Frontend + AI Assistant v8.11.4 broad baseline refresh

expertAssessments.rationale: Core route, dashboard core, and one authenticated AI streaming path were exercised on live production with durable evidence.
Deployment identity, version metadata, usage budget, and release-recovered canonical production path remain aligned on v8.11.4.
The production AI sidebar handled a representative CPU-summary prompt and returned streaming output with live latency metadata on the current build.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed during broad production QA; effective 4.6046 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no unexpected billed usage spike.

notes: Compared against broad production reference QA-20260406-0246 and refreshed the baseline on v8.11.4.
Synthetic /does-not-exist navigation emitted one top-level 404 resource console entry, but the main landing/login/dashboard/AI flow ended with 0 console errors.
Direct unauthenticated curl to /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 returned 401 as expected; authenticated browser-session fetch returned 200 text/event-stream with X-AI-Latency-Ms=219.
AI response ranked CPU leaders as api-was-dc1-01 (80%), web-nginx-dc1-02 (57%), web-nginx-dc1-01 (55%).
